author: y4rr
content: [result] NCCL backend implemented with 3 new modules: nccl_sys.rs (FFI bindings via runtime dlopen — works when NCCL is installed, graceful error when not), nccl_backend.rs (NcclBackend implementing Backend trait with GPU-native allreduce/broadcast/all_gather/reduce_scatter raw methods), nccl_collective.rs (high-level GPU-native collectives operating on GpuBufferHandle via raw_device_ptr). Added 'nccl' feature flag (implies 'gpu'), libc dependency, re-exports in lib.rs. Also added raw_device_ptr/raw_device_ptr_mut to GpuBackend trait + CudaBackendImpl. 3271 tests pass.
